achievements.description: Collect a grand total of 28,000 or more Pokos

achievements.description: Discover all 5 colors of Pikmin

achievements.description: Have 500 or more Red Pikmin

achievements.description: Have 500 or more Yellow Pikmin

achievements.description: Have 500 or more Blue Pikmin

achievements.description: Have 100 or more White Pikmin in the Ship
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.description: Have 100 or more Purple Pikmin in the Ship
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Population Savior
achievements.description: Have 1,500 or more total Pikmin
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Blooming Population
achievements.description: Have 500 or more Pikmin with Flowers in the Onion/Ship
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Friend of a Friend
achievements.description: Discover the Bulbmin
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Song of Love
achievements.description: Listen to the Pikmin sing "Ai no Uta" by having 20 of each color in your squad
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Spray to Save the Day
achievements.description: Discover both Ultra-Bitter Spray and Ultra-Spicy Spray
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Dandori Mode Initiated
achievements.description: Unlock the Challenge Mode
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Familiar Tune
achievements.description: Complete a cave and wait on the results screen for 3 minutes and 50 seconds
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Dweevil Dreaming
achievements.description: Take a nap and get picked up by a Dweevil
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Ultra-Spicy Collector
achievements.description: Collect 10 Ultra-Spicy Sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Ultra-Bitter Salvager
achievements.description: Collect 10 Ultra-Bitter Sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Pikmindo
achievements.description: Have the Pikmin on the title screen spell out "Nintendo"
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: King of Nothing At All
achievements.description: Watch Louie's Dark Secret
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Picked On
achievements.description: Petrify a creature in the Piklopedia
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Shortened Hibernation
achievements.description: Defeat the Burrowing Snagret in Valley of Repose
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Rude Awakening
achievements.description: Defeat the Burrowing Snagret outside of the Snagret Hole in Awakening Wood
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Breaking Up the Beetles with the Stones
achievements.description: Defeat the Iridescent Flint Beetle and the two Iridescent Glint Beetles in Awakening Wood in a single day with Ultra-Bitter Spray
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Pocketful of Posies
achievements.description: Collect the three 10 Pellet Posies and the 20 Pellet Posy in Awakening Wood and bring them to their corresponding onion (Day 11 or later)
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Uninvited to the Pool Party
achievements.description: Defeat the Beady Long Legs and Spotty Bulbear on the surface of Perplexing Pool (Day 31 or later)
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Mysterious Mites
achievements.description: Defeat both swarms of Ujadani in Wistful Wild (Day 31 and every 30 days after)
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: 10-Man Unit of Regal Reduction
achievements.description: Defeat the Empress Bulblax in the Hole of Beasts using only 10 Pikmin without any Pikmin dying or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Bird Flu
achievements.description: Defeat the Burrowing Snagret in the White Flower Garden using only White Pikmin, and without losing any Pikmin or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Piñata Party for 25
achievements.description: Defeat the Beady Long Legs in Citadel of Spiders using only 25 Yellow Pikmin, without losing any Pikmin, or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Glutton for Punishment
achievements.description: Defeat the Giant Breadbug without using Purple Pikmin, losing any Pikmin, or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Tyrannicide
achievements.description: Defeat the Emperor Bulblax in the Bulblax Kingdom in 35 seconds or less after landing on the final floor without losing any Pikmin or using any sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Lack of Royal Purple
achievements.description: Defeat the Emperor Bulblax in the Bulblax Kingdom without using Purple Pikmin, losing any Pikmin, or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: One Flew Over the Pikmin's Nest
achievements.description: Defeat the Pileated Snagret in the Snagret Hole within less than a minute of being on the final sublevel without using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Distraction Extraordinaire
achievements.description: Defeat the Ranging Bloyster in the Shower Room without either captain taking damage, losing any Pikmin, or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: The Ultimate Revenge
achievements.description: Defeat the Waterwraith without losing any Pikmin, Bulbmin, or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Water Pressure
achievements.description: Collect every treasure in the Submerged Castle and reach the final floor without ever encountering the Waterwraith - May use the "Give up and Escape" option to retry
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Larva Repellent
achievements.description: Defeat the Empress Bulblax in the Frontier Cavern without losing any Pikmin to Bulborb Larva or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Saving Private Pikmin
achievements.description: Defeat the Man-at-Legs in the Subterranean Complex without losing any Pikmin, using Purple Pikmin, or using Ultra-Bitter Sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Rock Crawbster
achievements.description: Defeat the Segmented Crawbster in the Cavern of Chaos without losing any Pikmin, switching captains, or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Despite All Its Rage
achievements.description: Defeat the Raging Long Legs in the Hole of Heroes in 1 minute and 30 seconds or less after landing on the final floor without losing any Pikmin or using sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Titan's End
achievements.description: Defeat the Titan Dweevil on the first encounter and collect its treasures afterwards without losing any Pikmin or using any sprays
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Defenseless Resource
achievements.description: Defeat the Titan Dweevil while it's petrified and receive 10 sprays
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Afraid of the Spray
achievements.description: Clear the debt without using Ultra-Bitter or Ultra-Spicy Spray
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Mr. Perfect Employee
achievements.description: Clear the debt without losing any Pikmin
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Medal of Honor
achievements.description: Collect all 201 treasures without losing more than 50 Pikmin
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: No Pikmin Left Behind
achievements.description: Collect all 201 treasures without ever leaving a Pikmin behind at the end of a day
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Get Rich Quick
achievements.description: Collect all 201 treasures in 15 days or less
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Projecting Strong Results
achievements.description: Collect the Geographic Projection on Day 3
achievements.author: Gollawiz

achievements.title: Perplexing Population
achievements.description: Create 100 or more Yellow Pikmin on the surface during your first day in Perplexing Pool (One Session)
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Woodland Worker
achievements.description: Collect all previously inaccessible treasures and have more than 30 Blue Pikmin on your first day with Yellow Pikmin in Awakening Wood (One Session)
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Winter Worker
achievements.description: Collect all previously inaccessible surface treasures on your first day with Blue Pikmin in Valley of Repose (One Session)
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Wild Work Day
achievements.description: Collect 4/5 surface treasures on your first day in Wistful Wild (One Session)
achievements.author: Griffin
